title: Debug assertion impliesNotNullRow: Assertion `pWalker->eCode==0' failed
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t0(c0 INT NOT NULL);
SELECT * FROM t0 LEFT JOIN t1 ON (t1.c0 BETWEEN '0' AND '1') WHERE (t0.c0 IS NULL OR t0.c0 > 0);
key_bug_features: LEFT JOIN with BETWEEN condition triggers assertion error
